calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 am and concluding at 9:55 am.

Plaintiff United Rentals (North America) Inc. is represented by Robert Cohen, Esq.
Defendant All Elements Services Inc. not appearing.

Noel Donato is sworn to testify on behalf of plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiffs counsel makes oral motion to dismiss the Doe defendants.

The Court GRANTS planitffs oral motion to dismiss Doe's.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff United Rentals (North America) Inc., and against Defendant All Elements Services Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $46,350.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: Denied
3. Costs: $653.00
4. Attorney fees waived.

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $47,003.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff United Rentals (North America) Inc. appearing represented by Robert Cohen, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant All Elements Services Inc. not appearing.

Mr. Cohen was informed the court did not receive paper courtesy copies of the relevant documents prior to this hearing.

This matter is continued to April 1, 2026 to allow Mr. Cohen an oppertunity to provide the court with paper courtesy copies.
